Part.Name: 是否等待反复测试执行

Para.Name: NTC电阻
Para.ControllerField: (10000*NTC电阻的两端电压)/(5-NTC电阻的两端电压)
Para.ControllerFieldOffset: (10000*NTC电阻的两端电压)/(5-NTC电阻的两端电压)

Para.Name: HB分BIN电阻
Para.ControllerField: (1000*HB分BIN电阻的两端电压)/(5-HB分BIN电阻的两端电压)
Para.ControllerFieldOffset: (1000*HB分BIN电阻的两端电压)/(5.26-HB分BIN电阻的两端电压)

Para.Name: ALB分BIN电阻
Para.ControllerField: (1000*ALB分BIN电阻的两端电压)/(5-ALB分BIN电阻的两端电压)
Para.ControllerFieldOffset: (1000*ALB分BIN电阻的两端电压)/(5.26-ALB分BIN电阻的两端电压)

StatusUnit.Name: IDLE
PRESTART
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 扫码.Method.ClearBuffer();

StatusUnit.Name: CHECKFAIL
扫码结束
RBIN
NTC
扫码
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: PLC.Method.ReadBarcode(P26480135:7:57);

StatusUnit.Name: 测试结束
Start
光型检测
模组运动到色度位置
模组运动到色度位置结束
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 亮色度计.Method.StartTestByAutoIntegralTime();

StatusUnit.Name: 读取色度值
debug1
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 检测程序.Field.Bbool67=0;

StatusUnit.Name: HBRBIN
HB输出电压
扫码2
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: PES光型检测.Field.TrackBarcode=扫码.Field.GetBarcodeStr;

StatusUnit.Name: PreStart
LB
HB
开始运动模组
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: PLC.Field.PcWriteServoRun=1; 检测程序.Method.Sleep(1000);

StatusUnit.Name: 模组运动到位
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: PLC.Field.PcWriteServoRun=0;

StatusUnit.Name: 扫码
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: PLC.Method.ReadBarcode(P26480135:7:57);

StatusUnit.Name: 扫码结束
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: PLC.Field.PcWriteBarcodeScanEnd=1; 检测程序.Method.Sleep(500);

StatusUnit.Name: ReadTrack
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: PES光型检测.Method.ReadTrack();

Condition.Name: IDLE_PRESTART
扫码结束_等待开始检测信号
Start_RBIN
Condition.ConditionFunction: PR4104007156001.Para.开始检测==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB图像显示==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PR4104007156001.Para.开始检测==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB图像显示==TRUE&&

Condition.Name: 等待开始检测信号_开始检测
是否反复测试_测试结束
光型检测_模组运动到色度位置
模组运动到色度位置_模组运动到色度位置结束
Condition.TargetSuName: 模组运动到色度位置结束
Condition.ConditionFunction: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& IN4301000227.Part.模组运动启动==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& IN4301000227.Part.模组运动启动==0&&

Condition.Name: 模组运动到色度位置结束_读取色度值
Condition.SourceSuName: 模组运动到色度位置结束
Condition.ConditionFunction: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& 检测程序.Field.Bbool185==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& 检测程序.Field.Bbool185==0&&

Condition.Name: 读取色度值_CHECKEND
Condition.ConditionFunction: PR4104007156001.Para.追溯结果==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.追溯结果_码1==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.追溯结果_码2==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB图像分析结果==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB图像显示==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_EMax==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_12L-H==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_9L-H==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_6L-H==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_3L-H==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_3R-H==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_6R-H==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_9R-H==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_12R-H==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_V-2U==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_-11_0==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_11_0==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_0_0==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_0_-1.15==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_0_5.5==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.ALB图像分析结果==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.ALB_0至上5度_EMax==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.ALB输入电压==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HV色度==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PR4104007156001.Para.追溯结果==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.追溯结果_码1==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.追溯结果_码2==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB图像分析结果==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB图像显示==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_EMax==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_12L-H==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_9L-H==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_6L-H==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_3L-H==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_3R-H==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_6R-H==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_9R-H==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_12R-H==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_V-2U==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_-11_0==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_11_0==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_0_0==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_0_-1.15==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HB_0_5.5==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.ALB图像分析结果==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.ALB_0至上5度_EMax==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.ALB输入电压==TRUE&& PR4104007156001.Para.HV色度==TRUE&&

Condition.Name: 二维码判断_等待开始检测信号
IDLE_PreStart
Condition.ConditionFunction: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==0&& 检测程序.Field.IsRun==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==0&& 检测程序.Field.IsRun==1&&

Condition.Name: PreStart_LB
Condition.ConditionFunction: PES光型检测.Field.IsLbOn==1&& PES光型检测.Field.IsHbOn==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PES光型检测.Field.IsLbOn==1&& PES光型检测.Field.IsHbOn==0&&

Condition.Name: LB_HB
Condition.ConditionFunction: PES光型检测.Field.IsLbOn==1&& PES光型检测.Field.IsHbOn==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PES光型检测.Field.IsLbOn==1&& PES光型检测.Field.IsHbOn==1&&

Condition.Name: LB_PreStart
Condition.ConditionFunction: PES光型检测.Field.IsLbOn==0&& PES光型检测.Field.IsHbOn==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PES光型检测.Field.IsLbOn==0&& PES光型检测.Field.IsHbOn==0&&

Condition.Name: HB_LB
Condition.ConditionFunction: PES光型检测.Field.IsLbOn==1&& PES光型检测.Field.IsHbOn==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PES光型检测.Field.IsLbOn==1&& PES光型检测.Field.IsHbOn==0&&

Condition.Name: HB_PreStart
Condition.ConditionFunction: PES光型检测.Field.IsLbOn==0&& PES光型检测.Field.IsHbOn==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PES光型检测.Field.IsLbOn==0&& PES光型检测.Field.IsHbOn==0&&

Condition.Name: PreStart_HB
Condition.ConditionFunction: PES光型检测.Field.IsLbOn==1&& PES光型检测.Field.IsHbOn==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PES光型检测.Field.IsLbOn==1&& PES光型检测.Field.IsHbOn==1&&

Condition.Name: IDLE_PreStart
Condition.ConditionFunction: 检测程序.Field.IsRun==1&& 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: 检测程序.Field.IsRun==1&& 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&&

Condition.Name: 开始运动模组_模组运动到位
模组运动到位_PreStart
Condition.ExitFunction: IN4301000227.Part.模组运动启动=0; 检测程序.Method.Sleep(1000);
Condition.ExitNote: IN4301000227.Part.模组运动启动=0; 检测程序.Method.Sleep(1000);

Condition.Name: IDLE_PRESTART
Condition.ConditionFunction: 检测程序.Field.IsRun==1&& 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: 检测程序.Field.IsRun==1&& 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==0&&
